case_title: LOPEZ, ADOLFO VS HERTZ CORPORATION. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZ CORPORATION.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ADOLFO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERTZ CORPORATION. HERTS WORLDWIDE RENT A CAR. CUSTOMERS RELATIONS. $737.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $787.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $737.30 FILED BY LOPEZ, ADOLFO AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZ CORPORATION. HERTS WORLDWIDE RENT A CAR. CUSTOMERS RELATIONS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
